subtitleNullable: Metrics, cost, and full gameplay logs of LLMs playing Balatro
descriptionNullable:
# Context
This dataset contains comprehensive benchmarks and gameplay logs of various Large Language Models (LLMs) attempting to play the roguelike deck-builder game **Balatro**. The data is generated using an automated pipeline that connects LLMs to the game engine, allowing them to make decisions based on the current game state.

This project is part of the **"Balatro AI Ecosystem"**:
*   **[BalatroBot](https://github.com/coder/balatrobot):** The interface exposing the game state via API.
*   **[BalatroLLM](https://github.com/coder/balatrollm):** The agent framework that allows LLMs to interact with the API.
*   **[BalatroBench](https://github.com/coder/balatrobench):** The analysis tool (this project) that aggregates results and generates this data.

# Content
The dataset is organized into two main directories:

## 1. `runs/` (Raw Data)
This directory contains the raw output for every individual game session run by an LLM.
*   **Structure:** Organized by `Model Version` -> `Strategy`.
*   **Key Files per Run:**
    *   `task.json`: Configuration of the run (Seed, Deck, Stake, Model parameters).
    *   `stats.json`: The raw performance metrics (Win/Loss, Round reached, Tokens used, Time taken, Cost).
    *   `strategy.json`: Metadata about the specific prompting or decision logic used.
    *   `requests.jsonl`: Step-by-step LLM API requests containing the prompts and game state context.
    *   `responses.jsonl`: Raw LLM API responses including tool calls and reasoning.
    *   `gamestates.jsonl`: Snapshot of the game state for each turn.
    *   `run.log`: Detailed execution log of the benchmark agent.
    *   `screenshots/`: (Optional) Visual captures of key game moments or the final state.

## 2. `benchmarks/` (Aggregated Analysis)
Processed JSON files used to generate leaderboards and statistical comparisons for the BalatroBench website.
*   `models/`: Comparative data between different models (e.g., GPT-5.2 vs Claude 4.5 Sonnet) using the same strategy.
*   `strategies/`: Comparative data of the same model using different strategies.
*   `manifest.json`: List of all available benchmark versions and strategies.

## Version Notes

###  Version 1 - 2026/01/26
Initial release on the dataset. Create using balatrollm v1.0.8. Compare to the result release on balatrobench.com, Kimi K2.5 is missing because it was released after the dataset had been published. It will be added in future versions.

tags.descriptionNullable: Video games were originally created to prevent people from going to college and getting good jobs. That back-fired and now we have data centers full of GPUs training models to tell the difference between cats and dogs. All thanks to gamers.
